svg.title: Verge architecture subway map
svg.desc: Verge architecture rendered as a subway map. A user terminus on the left connects through a Verge Worker hub at the Cloudflare edge. Three colored lines branch from the hub: an orange Publish line through Queue, Workers AI, KV, and D1; a teal Read line through the Cache API and D1; and a purple Realtime line to the CommentRoom Durable Object. R2 and external services GitHub OAuth and Resend appear as terminus stations at line ends.
svg.text: Reader and author traffic across the Cloudflare network
Publish: Worker → Queue → Workers AI ↔ KV → D1 (status=published) → Cache invalidate → Resend fan-out
Read: Worker → Cache API (HIT at edge) or → D1 (MISS, then cached)
